blocks.text: We received an RFQ pack from Pemberton Engineering for a 3-year MRO supply framework. The documents are in the matter folder. Review them and give me your read â what needs pushback, what's standard, what's commercially material?
I'll work through the Turn 1 discovery protocol, then read the RFQ pack and give you the landscape.

content.text:
RFQ Review Playbook â In-House Commercial Counsel

This playbook covers any inbound Request for Quotation (RFQ) or Request for Proposal (RFP) issued by a prospective customer or procurement-led buyer where our business is the bidder. It applies regardless of vertical, deal size, or counterparty. Treat it as the senior reviewer in the room: it tells you what to read first, what to look for, and what to push back on.

# 1. Triage order â read in this sequence

Reviewing every page of every document in linear filename order is the wrong approach. Read in importance order:

1. **Cover letter / RFQ invitation.** Establishes deadlines, scoring weights, the buyer's stated procurement objectives, the contact, and the disqualification triggers. Always read this first. Note disqualification rules â they reshape the scope of negotiable items.
2. **Master Supply Agreement / Master Services Agreement.** The load-bearing legal document. Most of the negotiation effort lives here. Identify asymmetries (see Â§2).
3. **Buyer's General Terms and Conditions (T&Cs / GTCs).** Often the trap layer. Routinely conflicts with the MSA. Check the order of precedence (see Â§3). Treat T&Cs as the buyer's true position â the MSA may have been edited for the bid but the GTCs are the standing house terms.
4. **Service Level Agreement.** Targets, penalties, escalation matrix, material-breach triggers. Penalty arithmetic compounds â read with a calculator.
5. **Compliance / ESG annex.** Modern slavery, anti-bribery, sanctions, environmental, data protection. Disqualification risk here is usually higher than commercial.
6. **Pricing schedule.** Read last from a legal perspective â the commercial team owns the numbers, but flag clauses that bind pricing behaviour (most-favoured-customer, open-book costing, audit of pricing).
7. **Questionnaire / RFP response template.** Skim only â flag any question that asks the bidder to commit to terms outside the MSA.

# 2. The asymmetries to look for in the MSA

Read every operative clause looking specifically for these recurring patterns. Each is a routine push-back point.

## 2.1 Indemnities

- **One-sided indemnity** running only from supplier to buyer (or only buyer to supplier in a buyer-side deal) â push for mutual where appropriate.
- **Uncapped indemnity** sitting outside the cap-of-liability clause â the most expensive class of risk; almost always negotiable to a separate higher cap.
- **Indemnity scope drift** â covering breach of contract, negligence, defect, IP, and "any applicable law" in one sweep. Decompose into named heads of liability.

## 2.2 Liability caps and exclusions

- **Asymmetric caps** â supplier capped at 12 months' fees while buyer is capped at a fixed (often tiny) amount, or uncapped. The MSA should have symmetric default caps with named carve-outs.
- **Carve-outs reading more like exclusions** â IP infringement, confidentiality, data protection, fraud, death/personal injury. Confirm the carve-outs are mutual.
- **Pure economic loss / loss of profit exclusions** â fine in principle, but check the carve-outs from the exclusion don't reintroduce uncapped exposure via the back door.

## 2.3 Termination

- **Termination for convenience by buyer only** â without a corresponding right for the supplier, this turns a 3-year framework into a 30-day rolling arrangement. Either remove or reciprocate; if neither, secure protective compensation (wind-down costs, work-in-progress, stranded costs, demobilisation).
- **Termination triggers that include "change of control to a competitor"** â push to define "competitor" tightly. Without definition this is buyer discretion.
- **Termination for insolvency / change of control / material breach** â typically reciprocal in principle but check the cure periods are workable (30 days is standard).

## 2.4 IP

- **Foreground IP assignment to buyer** for any work product â heavily restrict scope. The bidder's tooling, methodologies, frameworks, and pre-existing know-how (Background IP) must be carved out. Joint Foreground IP arising from the work should usually be jointly owned or licensed back to the supplier, not assigned absolutely to the buyer.
- **Perpetual royalty-free licence to background IP** "embedded in" deliverables â usually too broad. Limit to the scope necessary to use the deliverables for their intended purpose.

## 2.5 Audit rights

- Check the audit clause for scope (records only, or premises + systems + sub-contractors), notice period (5 BD is workable; 24h is not), frequency (twice a year is workable; "at any time" is not), cost (party-bearing rules), and survival period (4-6 years is reasonable; longer is not).

## 2.6 Payment

- **Payment terms longer than 60 days** are aggressive in most UK / EU markets. 90 days should be challenged unless reflected in pricing.
- **Late-payment interest at the statutory minimum** â under the Late Payment of Commercial Debts (Interest) Act 1998 the statutory rate is 8% over the Bank of England base rate. Confirm this is what is intended; aggressive buyers sometimes drop the rate.
- **Set-off rights** unilateral to the buyer â push for mutual or remove.

## 2.7 Pricing protections

- **Most-favoured-customer (MFC) clauses** â combined with audit rights they create a continuous compliance burden. Either resist or limit to genuinely comparable products on genuinely comparable terms within a defined customer cohort.
- **Open-book costing** for nominated SKUs â confirm what "open-book" means in practice, who sees the data, and the consequences of margin compression.
- **Unilateral price-adjustment rights by buyer** â should not exist. Pricing changes require mutual agreement.

## 2.8 Governing law and jurisdiction

- Check governing law matches the bidder's preferred forum. Local-buyer-jurisdiction is standard but problematic for cross-border bids.
- Check the dispute-resolution path â courts vs. arbitration. Arbitration is usually preferable for cross-border deals; courts for domestic.

# 3. Battle of forms

When buyers issue an RFQ pack containing both an MSA and standalone T&Cs:

- The **T&Cs almost always state they prevail over any other document.** That clause is often in the GTCs themselves and is the first place to look.
- The MSA may contain a contradictory order-of-precedence clause (MSA prevails). Flag both clauses for the negotiation table.
- Pricing schedules, SLAs, and annexes often carry their own clauses purporting to override the MSA. Map the precedence stack on a single page before negotiating.
- The bidder's accepted position should normally be: **bid response wording > redlined MSA > buyer's GTCs**, with any annexes ranking below the MSA. If the buyer refuses to flip the precedence, the bidder is effectively bidding on the T&Cs alone â price accordingly.

# 4. Procurement-specific risk areas

These show up in procurement-led bids more than in standalone deals:

- **Audit rights extending to subsidiaries and sub-suppliers** â supplier may not be able to grant these. Limit to the supplier and named principal sub-suppliers.
- **ESG attestation requirements** that demand a certifying signature at director level â confirm the bidder can attest accurately, particularly around Scope 3 emissions and SBTi targets. Negative attestations on disclosed non-compliance are usually safer than over-claiming.
- **Data Processing Annex by reference** â never accept "as updated by the controller from time to time" wording. The DPA must be fixed at a known version with negotiated change procedure.
- **Cyber-security minima** baked into the compliance annex (Cyber Essentials Plus, MFA, encryption, pen-testing, incident-notification windows) â these are often achievable but the timelines and audit rights need scoping.
- **Strategic stock holding** â confirm the supplier is being compensated for stock-holding cost, including capital, insurance, and obsolescence risk.
- **Change-of-control notification clauses** broader than the corresponding termination right â these can interfere with M&A processes. Limit to the termination trigger.

# 5. Output format

After review, produce two deliverables:

1. **Redlined draft of the load-bearing document** (typically the MSA â sometimes the buyer's GTCs if those are the prevailing instrument). Use track changes; include both substantive edits and short comments explaining the rationale for each material change.
2. **Cover memo to the business** â one page, three sections:
   - **Top-3 walk-away issues.** The matters on which the bidder should be willing to refuse the contract if not resolved. Three is the practical limit â beyond three the business will pick favourites and you lose the others.
   - **Top-5 high-priority push-back items.** Significant economic or risk exposures that should be pushed but are not deal-breakers.
   - **Acceptable / nice-to-have items.** Everything else, with a one-line note per item.

The memo is what the business reads; the redline is what gets traded. Pitch the memo to a non-lawyer audience.

# 6. Sign-off and escalation

- Walk-away issues must be escalated to the General Counsel or designated approver before being conceded.
- Compliance non-conformance (Modern Slavery, Bribery Act, sanctions, data protection) must be escalated to the appropriate function (compliance, DPO) before being conceded.
- Pricing concessions beyond agreed envelopes must be escalated to the commercial sponsor.

# 7. What this playbook does NOT cover

- Specific pricing benchmarks (commercial team's domain).
- Jurisdiction-specific tax structuring (specialist tax counsel).
- Industry-specific regulatory obligations (e.g. medical-device QMS, financial-services outsourcing, defence procurement) â bring in subject-matter specialists.
- Disputes-handling once a contract is live (handled under the dispute-resolution clause of the executed contract).

This playbook supports first-pass review by a competent commercial counsel. Anything outside its scope, escalate.

<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

> **File Path:** `/root/Documents/Oscar GC/Commercial/S32-810479 Sprint 30 â Pemberton RFQ pack + redline c09/02-master-supply-agreement.docx`

# Master Supply Agreement (Draft for Bidder Mark-Up)

Pemberton Engineering Ltd.Â â Indirect MRO Framework â 3-Year Term

**THIS MASTER SUPPLY AGREEMENT** is made on [DATE] 2027

**BETWEEN**

* **PEMBERTON ENGINEERING LTD.**, a company incorporated in England and Wales with registered number 03741892 whose registered office is at Unit 14, Trafford Park Industrial Estate, Manchester M17 1RH (â**Buyer**â); and

* **[BIDDER NAME]**, a company incorporated in [JURISDICTION] with registered number [NUMBER] whose registered office is at [ADDRESS] (â**Supplier**â).

(each a â**Party**â and together the â**Parties**â).

## 1. Definitions and Interpretation

1.1 In this Agreement, the following definitions apply:

* â**Affiliate**â means, in relation to a person, any entity that controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with that person.

* â**Background IP**â means Intellectual Property Rights owned or licensed by a Party as at the Effective Date.

* â**Confidential Information**â has the meaning given in clause 14.

* â**Effective Date**â means 1 January 2027.

* â**Foreground IP**â means Intellectual Property Rights created or developed in the performance of this Agreement, whether solely by a Party or jointly.

* â**Goods**â means the goods described in the Pricing Schedule, as may be amended from time to time.

* â**GTCs**â means Buyerâs General Terms and Conditions of Purchase as in force from time to time.

* â**Intellectual Property Rights**â or â**IPR**â means all patents, copyrights, design rights, trade marks, trade secrets and other intellectual or industrial property rights worldwide whether registered or unregistered.

* â**Order**â means a purchase order issued by Buyer for Goods.

* â**Services**â means the related services described in the Pricing Schedule or any Order.

* â**Term**â has the meaning given in clause 3.

1.2 Headings are for convenience only and do not affect interpretation.

1.3 Where any conflict arises between this Agreement and the GTCs, the **GTCs shall prevail**.

## 2. Appointment

2.1 Buyer appoints Supplier on a non-exclusive basis to supply the Goods and Services during the Term.

2.2 Buyer makes no commitment to any minimum volume or value of Orders. Forecasts provided by Buyer are non-binding indications only.

## 3. Term

3.1 This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and shall continue for a period of **three (3) years** unless terminated earlier in accordance with clause 18 (the â**Initial Term**â).

3.2 The Initial Term may be extended for a further period of up to two (2) years by mutual written agreement, such extension to be on the same terms as this Agreement unless the Parties agree otherwise in writing.

## 4. Orders

4.1 Buyer may issue Orders by any reasonable means including electronically. Each Order shall be deemed to incorporate this Agreement and the GTCs.

4.2 Supplier shall acknowledge each Order within two (2) Business Days. Failure to acknowledge within that period shall constitute acceptance of the Order on the terms set out therein.

4.3 Buyer may cancel or amend any Order at any time prior to despatch without liability to Supplier other than reimbursement of demonstrable direct costs reasonably incurred up to the date of cancellation, capped at fifteen percent (15%) of the Order value.

## 5. Pricing and Rebates

5.1 Prices are as set out in the Pricing Schedule and are exclusive of VAT.

5.2 Prices are firm for the first twelve (12) months of the Term. Thereafter Supplier may propose annual price adjustments capped at the lower of UK CPI and 2.5%. Buyer shall have absolute discretion to accept or reject any proposed adjustment.

5.3 Rebates shall accrue and be paid as set out in the Pricing Schedule.

5.4 Buyer reserves the right to benchmark prices at any time and to require Supplier to match any verified third-party offer for substantially comparable Goods.

## 6. Invoicing and Payment

6.1 Supplier shall invoice Buyer on a monthly basis in arrears.

6.2 Payment terms are **ninety (90) days** from receipt of a valid undisputed invoice.

6.3 Where any sum is disputed, payment of the disputed portion may be withheld pending resolution; the undisputed balance shall be paid in accordance with clause 6.2.

6.4 Interest on overdue undisputed sums shall accrue at the statutory rate under the Late Payment of Commercial Debts (Interest) Act 1998. The parties agree that this rate represents a substantial remedy under section 8 of that Act.

## 7. Delivery and Risk

7.1 Delivery shall be Incoterms 2020 DDP to the receiving site nominated in the Order.

7.2 Risk in the Goods passes to Buyer on signed acceptance at the receiving site. Title passes on payment in full in accordance with clause 6.

7.3 Supplier shall meet the service levels in the SLA. Failure to meet OTIF targets in any three (3) consecutive months shall constitute material breach for the purposes of clause 18.2.

## 8. Quality and Acceptance

8.1 Goods shall conform to the specification, applicable industry standards, and any sample provided.

8.2 Buyer may inspect and test Goods at any reasonable time. Non-conforming Goods may be rejected within thirty (30) days of delivery, at Supplierâs cost and risk.

8.3 Supplier warrants Goods against defects in materials and workmanship for a period of twenty-four (24) months from acceptance.

## 9. Intellectual Property

9.1 Each Party retains ownership of its Background IP.

9.2 **All Foreground IP** â including any modifications, improvements, derivatives, or jointly developed materials arising in connection with this Agreement â **shall vest in Buyer absolutely on creation**. Supplier hereby assigns to Buyer with full title guarantee all such Foreground IP, including future rights.

9.3 Supplier shall, at Buyerâs cost, do all such acts and execute all such documents as Buyer may reasonably require to perfect Buyerâs title.

9.4 Supplier grants Buyer a perpetual, irrevocable, royalty-free, worldwide, sublicensable licence to use Supplierâs Background IP to the extent embedded in or required to exploit any Goods or Foreground IP.

## 10. Indemnity

10.1 **Supplier shall indemnify, defend and hold harmless Buyer, its Affiliates, and their respective officers, directors, employees and agents** from and against any and all claims, losses, damages, liabilities, costs and expenses (including reasonable legal fees on a full indemnity basis) arising out of or in connection with:

* any breach by Supplier of this Agreement;

* any negligent act or omission of Supplier or its personnel;

* any defect in the Goods or Services;

* any infringement or alleged infringement of any third-party Intellectual Property Right; and

* any breach by Supplier of any applicable law or regulation.

10.2 The indemnities in this clause 10 are uncapped and survive termination.

## 11. Limitation of Liability

11.1 Subject always to clause 10 (which is uncapped), Supplierâs aggregate liability under or in connection with this Agreement and any Order, whether in contract, tort (including negligence), misrepresentation or otherwise, shall not exceed an amount equal to the fees paid or payable by Buyer to Supplier in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the claim.

11.2 **Buyerâs aggregate liability** under or in connection with this Agreement, howsoever arising, **shall in no event exceed ÂĢ100,000.**

11.3 Neither Party shall be liable for indirect, consequential or pure economic loss; provided that this exclusion shall not apply to (i) Supplierâs indemnity obligations under clause 10, (ii) breach of confidentiality, or (iii) breach of clauses 13, 15 or 16.

## 12. Insurance

12.1 Supplier shall maintain at its own cost throughout the Term and for six (6) years thereafter:

* public and product liability insurance of not less than ÂĢ10 million per claim and in the aggregate;

* professional indemnity insurance of not less than ÂĢ5 million per claim and in the aggregate; and

* employerâs liability insurance to the statutory minimum.

12.2 Supplier shall provide certificates of insurance on request and shall give Buyer thirty (30) daysâ notice of any material change to its cover.

## 13. Compliance

13.1 Supplier shall comply with the Compliance and ESG Annex (Document 06), which forms part of this Agreement.

13.2 Supplier represents and warrants that:

* it complies with the Modern Slavery Act 2015 and maintains a current modern slavery statement;

* it complies with the Bribery Act 2010 and maintains adequate procedures within the meaning of section 7 of that Act;

* it complies with all applicable sanctions, export control and anti-money-laundering laws;

* neither it, its Affiliates, nor any of its personnel involved in performing this Agreement is a Sanctioned Person or located in a Sanctioned Jurisdiction; and

* it maintains and shall maintain an environmental management system certified to ISO 14001 or equivalent.

13.3 Supplier shall provide an annual ESG attestation in the form prescribed in the Compliance Annex, signed at director level.

## 14. Confidentiality

14.1 Each Party shall treat the otherâs Confidential Information as confidential and use it only for the purposes of this Agreement.

14.2 The obligations of confidence in clause 14.1 shall continue indefinitely.

14.3 The confidentiality obligations shall not apply to information that is (i) in the public domain through no fault of the receiving Party; (ii) lawfully received from a third party without restriction; or (iii) required to be disclosed by law or regulatory authority.

## 15. Data Protection

15.1 The Parties shall comply with the data processing terms set out in the Data Processing Annex available on request from Buyerâs Data Protection Officer, which shall be deemed to be incorporated into this Agreement on its current terms from time to time.

## 16. Audit Rights

16.1 Buyer may, on giving five (5) Business Daysâ written notice, audit Supplierâs records, premises, systems and personnel insofar as they relate to Supplierâs performance of this Agreement, compliance with clause 13, or pricing under clause 5.

16.2 Audits may be conducted by Buyer or by a third-party auditor of Buyerâs choosing. Supplier shall provide reasonable cooperation and access at its own cost.

16.3 Audit rights survive termination for a period of six (6) years.

## 17. Force Majeure

17.1 Neither Party shall be liable for failure or delay in performance caused by an event beyond its reasonable control, provided that the affected Party gives prompt written notice and uses reasonable efforts to mitigate.

17.2 If a force majeure event continues for more than thirty (30) days, **Buyer** (but not Supplier) may terminate this Agreement on written notice without liability.

## 18. Termination

18.1 **Termination for Convenience.** Buyer may terminate this Agreement or any Order at any time **without cause** on **thirty (30) daysâ written notice** to Supplier. No early-termination charges shall be payable other than reimbursement of demonstrable direct costs reasonably incurred up to the date of termination, capped at five percent (5%) of the value of work-in-progress on the termination date.

18.2 **Termination for Cause.** Either Party may terminate this Agreement on written notice if the other Party (i) commits a material breach that is not remediable, or is remediable but is not remedied within thirty (30) days of written notice; (ii) becomes insolvent; or (iii) undergoes a change of control to a competitor of Buyer.

18.3 On termination Supplier shall, at no charge, transfer to Buyer or a nominated replacement supplier all data, materials, and Foreground IP relating to the Goods and Services.

## 19. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

19.1 This Agreement and any dispute arising out of or in connection with it shall be governed by **English law**.

19.2 The Parties submit to the **exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Manchester**, England.

## 20. General

20.1 **Order of precedence.** In the event of any conflict between (a) this Agreement, (b) the GTCs, (c) the SLA, (d) the Compliance Annex, or (e) any Order, the order of precedence shall be (b), (a), (d), (c), (e). For the avoidance of doubt, **the GTCs prevail over this Agreement**.

20.2 **Assignment.** Buyer may assign this Agreement or any rights under it to any Affiliate or to any successor in business. Supplier may not assign or subcontract without Buyerâs prior written consent.

20.3 **Variation.** No variation is effective unless in writing and signed by an authorised representative of each Party.

20.4 **Entire agreement.** This Agreement, together with the documents referred to in clause 20.1, constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties.

20.5 **Notices.** Notices shall be given in writing to the addresses set out at the head of this Agreement.

20.6 **Third-party rights.** A person who is not a Party has no right under the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Act 1999 to enforce any term of this Agreement, save that Affiliates of Buyer may enforce clauses 9, 10, 13, 14, 15 and 16.

**IN WITNESS WHEREOF** the Parties have executed this Agreement on the date set out at the head of this Agreement.

Signed for and on behalf of **Pemberton Engineering Ltd.**:

Name: Title: Date:

Signed for and on behalf of **[BIDDER NAME]**:

Name: Title: Date:

---

10.2 The indemnities in this clause 10 are uncapped and survive termination.

## 11. Limitation of Liability

11.1 Subject always to clause 10 (which is uncapped), Supplierâs aggregate liability under or in connection with this Agreement and any Order, whether in contract, tort (including negligence), misrepresentation or otherwise, shall not exceed an amount equal to the fees paid or payable by Buyer to Supplier in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the claim.

11.2 **Buyerâs aggregate liability** under or in connection with this Agreement, howsoever arising, **shall in no event exceed ÂĢ100,000.**

11.3 Neither Party shall be liable for indirect, consequential or pure economic loss; provided that this exclusion shall not apply to (i) Supplierâs indemnity obligations under clause 10, (ii) breach of confidentiality, or (iii) breach of clauses 13, 15 or 16.

## 12. Insurance

12.1 Supplier shall maintain at its own cost throughout the Term and for six (6) years thereafter:

* public and product liability insurance of not less than ÂĢ10 million per claim and in the aggregate;

* professional indemnity insurance of not less than ÂĢ5 million per claim and in the aggregate; and

* employerâs liability insurance to the statutory minimum.

12.2 Supplier shall provide certificates of insurance on request and shall give Buyer thirty (30) daysâ notice of any material change to its cover.

## 13. Compliance

13.1 Supplier shall comply with the Compliance and ESG Annex (Document 06), which forms part of this Agreement.

13.2 Supplier represents and warrants that:

* it complies with the Modern Slavery Act 2015 and maintains a current modern slavery statement;

* it complies with the Bribery Act 2010 and maintains adequate procedures within the meaning of section 7 of that Act;

* it complies with all applicable sanctions, export control and anti-money-laundering laws;

* neither it, its Affiliates, nor any of its personnel involved in performing this Agreement is a Sanctioned Person or located in a Sanctioned Jurisdiction; and

* it maintains and shall maintain an environmental management system certified to ISO 14001 or equivalent.

13.3 Supplier shall provide an annual ESG attestation in the form prescribed in the Compliance Annex, signed at director level.

## 14. Confidentiality

14.1 Each Party shall treat the otherâs Confidential Information as confidential and use it only for the purposes of this Agreement.

14.2 The obligations of confidence in clause 14.1 shall continue indefinitely.

14.3 The confidentiality obligations shall not apply to information that is (i) in the public domain through no fault of the receiving Party; (ii) lawfully received from a third party without restriction; or (iii) required to be disclosed by law or regulatory authority.

## 15. Data Protection

15.1 The Parties shall comply with the data processing terms set out in the Data Processing Annex available on request from Buyerâs Data Protection Officer, which shall be deemed to be incorporated into this Agreement on its current terms from time to time.

## 16. Audit Rights

16.1 Buyer may, on giving five (5) Business Daysâ written notice, audit Supplierâs records, premises, systems and personnel insofar as they relate to Supplierâs performance of this Agreement, compliance with clause 13, or pricing under clause 5.

16.2 Audits may be conducted by Buyer or by a third-party auditor of Buyerâs choosing. Supplier shall provide reasonable cooperation and access at its own cost.

16.3 Audit rights survive termination for a period of six (6) years.

## 17. Force Majeure

17.1 Neither Party shall be liable for failure or delay in performance caused by an event beyond its reasonable control, provided that the affected Party gives prompt written notice and uses reasonable efforts to mitigate.

17.2 If a force majeure event continues for more than thirty (30) days, **Buyer** (but not Supplier) may terminate this Agreement on written notice without liability.

## 18. Termination

18.1 **Termination for Convenience.** Buyer may terminate this Agreement or any Order at any time **without cause** on **thirty (30) daysâ written notice** to Supplier. No early-termination charges shall be payable other than reimbursement of demonstrable direct costs reasonably incurred up to the date of termination, capped at five percent (5%) of the value of work-in-progress on the termination date.

18.2 **Termination for Cause.** Either Party may terminate this Agreement on written notice if the other Party (i) commits a material breach that is not remediable, or is remediable but is not remedied within thirty (30) days of written notice; (ii) becomes insolvent; or (iii) undergoes a change of control to a competitor of Buyer.

18.3 On termination Supplier shall, at no charge, transfer to Buyer or a nominated replacement supplier all data, materials, and Foreground IP relating to the Goods and Services.

## 19. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

19.1 This Agreement and any dispute arising out of or in connection with it shall be governed by **English law**.

19.2 The Parties submit to the **exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Manchester**, England.

## 20. General

20.1 **Order of precedence.** In the event of any conflict between (a) this Agreement, (b) the GTCs, (c) the SLA, (d) the Compliance Annex, or (e) any Order, the order of precedence shall be (b), (a), (d), (c), (e). For the avoidance of doubt, **the GTCs prevail over this Agreement**.

20.2 **Assignment.** Buyer may assign this Agreement or any rights under it to any Affiliate or to any successor in business. Supplier may not assign or subcontract without Buyerâs prior written consent.

20.3 **Variation.** No variation is effective unless in writing and signed by an authorised representative of each Party.

20.4 **Entire agreement.** This Agreement, together with the documents referred to in clause 20.1, constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties.

20.5 **Notices.** Notices shall be given in writing to the addresses set out at the head of this Agreement.

20.6 **Third-party rights.** A person who is not a Party has no right under the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Act 1999 to enforce any term of this Agreement, save that Affiliates of Buyer may enforce clauses 9, 10, 13, 14, 15 and 16.

**IN WITNESS WHEREOF** the Parties have executed this Agreement on the date set out at the head of this Agreement.

Signed for and on behalf of **Pemberton Engineering Ltd.**:

Name: Title: Date:

Signed for and on behalf of **[BIDDER NAME]**:

Name: Title: Date:

---
## Footnotes

<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>

                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>
